title: Opening for Software Engineer at Cropin

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Cropin
jsonLd.description:
Cropin invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cropin:
Cropin is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin!
